creator: svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru
text:
Maintainer update of devel/p5-Workflow
	Fixing critical bug in the distribution by means of a "freebsd patch".
	Please create new directory "files" and place there a new file patch-lib-Workflow-Factory.pm
	I am submitting result of "diff -urN" command. 
	Not sure what is a correct way to submit changes for a port when a new directory has to be created.
